creator: tkato432@yahoo.com
text:
>Number:         178587
>Category:       ports
>Synopsis:       www/py-formencode: Update to version 1.2.6
>Confidential:   no
>Severity:       non-critical
>Priority:       low
>Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>State:          open
>Quarter:        
>Keywords:       
>Date-Required:
>Class:          change-request
>Submitter-Id:   current-users
>Arrival-Date:   Mon May 13 18:10:05 UTC 2013
>Closed-Date:
>Last-Modified:
>Originator:     KATO Tsuguru
>Release:        FreeBSD 7.4-RELEASE-p11 i386
>Organization:
>Environment:
>Description:
- Update to version 1.2.6

>How-To-Repeat:
>Fix:

diff -urN /usr/ports/www/py-formencode/Makefile www/py-formencode/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/www/py-formencode/Makefile	2013-04-25 05:21:01.000000000 +0900
+++ www/py-formencode/Makefile	2013-05-14 00:00:49.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	py-formencode
-# Date created:		2005-11-16
-# Whom:			Choe, Cheng-Dae
-#
+# Created by: Choe, Cheng-Dae
 # $FreeBSD: head/www/py-formencode/Makefile 316464 2013-04-24 18:10:30Z ak $
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	formencode
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.4
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.6
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -15,20 +11,25 @@
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	HTML form validation, generation, and conversion package
 
-USE_PYTHON=		-2.7
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
-USES=		gettext
+LICENSE=	PSFL
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
 
+USE_ZIP=	yes
+USES=		gettext:run
+USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	FormEncode
 
 DOCSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/py-${PORTNAME}
-EXAMPLESDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/examples/py-${PORTNAME}
 
 PORTDOCS=	*
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
 post-install:
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 	@(cd ${WRKSRC}/docs/ && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${DOCSDIR})
 .endif
 
diff -urN /usr/ports/www/py-formencode/distinfo www/py-formencode/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/www/py-formencode/distinfo	2012-11-08 10:43:25.000000000 +0900
+++ www/py-formencode/distinfo	2013-05-14 00:00:49.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (FormEncode-1.2.4.tar.gz) = 8270840ee832055463b3d3328f8ae4b881e1fbe84353c97af1d913df3401feb9
-SIZE (FormEncode-1.2.4.tar.gz) = 240034
+SHA256 (FormEncode-1.2.6.zip) = 70fc1d2cf8022b1cc7fcebb5d87cc984dde799e587f05c0a0fe509b374221b0c
+SIZE (FormEncode-1.2.6.zip) = 318441

@@ -21,6 +21,9 @@
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/doctest_xml_compare.py

+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/exc.pyo

 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/fieldstorage.pyo
@@ -56,14 +59,10 @@

 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/i18n/it/LC_MESSAGES/FormEncode.po
-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/i18n/lt/LC_MESSAGES/FormEncode.mo
-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/i18n/lt/LC_MESSAGES/FormEncode.po
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/i18n/ja/LC_MESSAGES/FormEncode.mo
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/i18n/ja/LC_MESSAGES/FormEncode.po
-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/i18n/tr/LC_MESSAGES/FormEncode.mo
-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/i18n/tr/LC_MESSAGES/FormEncode.po
-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/i18n/zh_TW/LC_MESSAGES/FormEncode.mo
-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/i18n/zh_TW/LC_MESSAGES/FormEncode.po
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/i18n/lt/LC_MESSAGES/FormEncode.mo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/i18n/lt/LC_MESSAGES/FormEncode.po
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/formencode/i18n/msgfmt.py

@@ -83,8 +82,12 @@
